exact.貫通2 直線射程3(敵味方無差別)・反動ドリフト: Pierce 2, straight range 3 (hits anyone), recoil drift
exact.突進2: 直線上の標的に2ダメージして停止: Charge 2: deal 2 damage to target in line, then stop
exact.射程2の敵を引き寄せ(ドリフトを自分向きに): Pull enemy at range 2 (drift toward you)
exact.隣接空きマスに機雷2個 🔥ロスト: Spawn 2 mines on adjacent empty tiles 🔥Lost
exact.隣接空きマスに岩塊1個: Spawn 1 rock on adjacent empty tile
exact.射程2の敵のドリフトを任意方向に設定: Set drift of enemy at range 2 to any direction
exact.射程2の全敵を1マス引き寄せ: Pull all enemies at range 2 by 1 tile
exact.癖がなく、すべての戦術が一通りこなせる。最初の相棒。: No quirks — handles every tactic reasonably well. Your first partner.
exact.物理マスター: 衝突/激突で自軍は無傷・与ダメ+1: Physical Mastery: no self-damage from collisions/rams, +1 damage dealt
exact.ぶつかるために生まれた船。機雷も岩も敵も、すべては「ぶつける物」。: Built to crash into things. Mines, rocks, enemies — all just things to ram.
exact.精密照準: 攻撃系の射程+1 — ただし船体が脆い(HP7): Precision Aim: +1 range on attacks — but a fragile hull (HP 7)
exact.届かない間合いから削り切る。触らせなければ負けない — 触られなければ。: Whittles them down from beyond reach. Untouchable, as long as nothing touches you.
exact.火力押しを罰する — 物理キルは素通しだ: Punishes brute force — physical kills slip right through
exact.手数勝負 — 同士討ちと爆発で間引け: A numbers game — thin them with friendly fire and explosions
exact.寿命が縮む — 深く跳ぶか、早く帰るか: Shortens your lifespan — jump deep or head home early
exact.整備ドックの「補給」が使えない: "Resupply" is unavailable at the maintenance dock
exact.回復は物理キルの装甲板だけ — ぶつけて生きろ: Only physical-kill armor plating heals you — ram to survive
exact.罠だらけ — だが罠はあんたの武器でもある: Traps everywhere — but traps are your weapon too
exact.出撃時の旗艦HP-2: Flagship starts each sortie at -2 HP
exact.被弾1点が重い — 完璧な盤面操作を: Every point of damage hurts — play the board perfectly
exact.銀色の槽の中で、何かがまだ脈打っている。: Something still pulses inside the silver vat.
exact.持っているだけで輪郭がにじむ。たぶん気のせいじゃない。: Just holding it blurs your outline. Probably not your imagination.
exact.落ちない錨。むしろ周りが落ちてくる。: An anchor that never falls. If anything, everything else falls toward it.
exact.ひびの奥で恒星の欠片が燃えている。修理? 無理無理。: A shard of a star still burns behind the crack. Repair it? Not a chance.
exact.死文明の星図: Star Chart of a Dead Civilization
exact.もう存在しない星々の地図。だが座標は今も生きている。: A map of stars that no longer exist. The coordinates still work, though.
exact.彼らが最後に作ったもの。彼らが滅びた理由かもしれない。: The last thing they built. Maybe the reason they're gone.
exact.最寄りの獲物へ1歩近づき、隣接していれば殴る。単純。だが慣性で滑って勝手に間合い: Steps 1 tile toward the nearest prey and swings if adjacent. Simple — but inertia drags it closer than you'd expect.
exact.間合い2を保って撃つ。近づくと離れ、遠いと寄ってくる。直線武器か押し付けで詰めろ: Holds range 2 and shoots. Backs off if you close in, closes in if you back off. Close the gap with straight-line weapons or a shove.
exact.↑→↓←の決まった巡回。本体の周囲1マス(触手)は敵味方問わず刺す — 敵を触手: Patrols a fixed up-right-down-left loop. Its tentacles (1-tile radius) sting anyone, friend or foe — shove enemies into them.
exact.速い。毎ターン2マス詰めてくる(+慣性)。先に撃つか、軌道上に罠を置け: Fast. Closes 2 tiles every turn (plus inertia). Shoot first or lay a trap in its path.
exact.不動・ドリフトなし。1ラウンドかけて直線を充填(橙)し、次のラウンドにその列を焼: Immobile, no drift. Spends 1 round charging a line (orange), then torches that row next round — friend or foe!
exact.分厚い甲殻が武器ダメージを1軽減。だが衝突・激突・爆発(物理)は素通しだ — 撃: Thick carapace reduces weapon damage by 1. But collisions, rams, and explosions (physical) go right through — don't shoot it, crack it open.
exact.倒すと幼体2体に分裂して手数を喰う。機雷や渦のそばで割るか、幼体ごと薙ぎ払え: Splits into 2 larvae on death, eating up your actions. Pop it near a mine or vortex, or sweep the larvae away too.
exact.分裂体の欠片。1発で消えるが、群れると囓り殺される: A splitter's fragment. Dies in one hit, but a swarm of them will nibble you to death.
exact.毎ターン、最も傷ついた敵をHP+1修復しながら逃げ回る。放置はジリ貧 — 何を置: Heals the most wounded enemy by 1 HP every turn while fleeing. Ignore it and you'll bleed out — kill it first, no matter what.
exact.位相転移で跳ぶ(慣性も衝突も無視)。間合い2から撃つ。転移先は予告される — 着: Phase-jumps (ignores inertia and collisions), then shoots from range 2. The landing spot is telegraphed — read it and set a trap.
exact.歩く機雷。隣まで来ると自爆(周囲1マスに2ダメージ)。遠くで撃ち抜くか、押し返し: A walking mine. Self-destructs when adjacent (2 damage to everyone within 1 tile). Snipe it from afar, or shove it into an enemy cluster.
exact.十字の射線を読め。機雷を産む — だが機雷は、こちらの武器にもなる。: Read the cross-shaped line of fire. It spawns mines — but mines can be your weapon too.
exact.不動。十字に充填→焼却を繰り返し、合間に機雷を産み落とす。レーンを外し続けろ: Immobile. Repeats charge-then-torch in a cross pattern, dropping mines in between. Keep dodging the lanes.
exact.照準→轢断の2拍子。装甲は銃を弾く — 機雷と岩の上へ誘い出して自滅させろ。: A two-beat aim-then-crush pattern. Its armor deflects gunfire — lure it over mines and rocks to self-destruct.
exact.装甲突進ボス。1ラウンドかけて照準(橙レーン)し、次のラウンドにそのレーンを轢断: Armored charger boss. Spends 1 round aiming (orange lane), then crushes that lane next round (2 damage to the first thing it hits, and it jolts itself too). Obstacles are its bane.
exact.群れを産みながら位相転移で逃げ回る。手数で溺れる前に、転移先を読んで追い詰めろ。: Spawns broods while phase-jumping away. Read its landing spots and corner it before its swarm drowns you.
exact.自分では殴らない。毎ターン幼体や自爆種を産み付け、近づけば位相転移で逃げる。巣ご: Never attacks directly. Spawns larvae or bomb spores every turn and phase-jumps away if approached. A race to burn the whole nest down.
exact.漂う岩。ぶつかれば双方1ダメージ。撃ち砕いて道を開けるか、敵を叩きつけろ: A drifting rock. Colliding deals 1 damage to both sides. Shoot it clear or slam an enemy into it.
exact.触れるな。壊れると周囲1マス全てに2ダメージ(誘爆あり)。敵を押し込む最高の罠: Don't touch it. Breaking it deals 2 damage to everyone within 1 tile (can chain-detonate). The best trap for shoving enemies into.
exact.宇宙全体を罠に変える人: The one who turns all of space into a trap
exact.軌道を読み、危険を選び、罠を編む。深淵で最も恐れられる種類の船長だ。: Reads trajectories, courts danger, weaves traps. The most feared kind of captain in the abyss.
exact.ただし保険には入らないタイプ。: Just don't expect them to carry insurance.
exact.ぶつかってから考える人: The one who rams first and thinks later
exact.危険ルートに鼻歌で突っ込み、体当たりで道を開く。その勢いは数字を超える。: Hums a tune while charging into danger routes, ramming a path open. The momentum defies the numbers.
exact.燃料計はたぶん飾りだと思っている。: Probably thinks the fuel gauge is just decoration.
exact.爆発を芸術と呼ぶ人: The one who calls explosions art
exact.安全マージンの上に、最小の手数で最大の衝突を設計する。整備班の信頼が厚い。: Designs maximum collisions with minimum moves, all within a safety margin. The maintenance crew trusts them deeply.
exact.精算が地味なのは保険料のせい。: The payout looks modest only because of the insurance premiums.
exact.装甲を信じて直進する人: The one who trusts the armor and charges straight ahead
exact.考えるより先に船体が動く。だが宇宙では、それで通ることが結構ある。: The hull moves before the thought finishes. Out here, that works more often than it should.
exact.修理班からの請求書は見ない主義。: Makes a point of never reading the repair bill.
exact.最後の1マスまで読む人: The one who reads it out to the very last tile
exact.危険を選び、しかし引き金は焦らない。レーンの先の未来が見えている。: Chooses danger, but never rushes the trigger. Sees the future waiting down the lane.
exact.読みすぎて燃料が先に尽きる日もある。: Some days the overthinking burns through the fuel first.
exact.引き金と契約だけが早い人: The one who's only quick with triggers and contracts
exact.レア遺物の匂いに迷いがない。深淵はあんたみたいな船長のためにある。: Never hesitates at the scent of a rare relic. The abyss exists for captains like you.
exact.帰り道のことは帰り道に考える。: Worries about the way home once already on it.
exact.石橋を叩いてから撃つ人: The one who tests the bridge before shooting
exact.全ての射撃に根拠がある。「生存率」という言葉が服を着て歩いている。: Every shot has a reason behind it. "Survival rate" walking around in a coat.
exact.乾杯すら誰よりも慎重にやる。: Even raises a toast more carefully than anyone else.
exact.儲かったら帰る人: The one who heads home once the profit's in
exact.欲をかかず、確実に持ち帰る。母港で一番愛されるのはこういう船長だ。: No greed, just a sure thing brought home. The most beloved captain type back at port.
exact.伝説にはならないが、長生きはする。: Never becomes a legend, but lives a long life.
